description_long: This is a medium-sized rectangular cardboard parcel, commonly used for shipping and deliveries in urban environments. The box is constructed from light brown corrugated cardboard and is sealed with a wide strip of opaque white packing tape running along the top and partially down the sides. The edges are crisp and the surfaces are flat, with subtle vertical lines indicating the corrugated texture of the cardboard. The box appears to be fully closed and does not display any visible labels, markings, or branding. Its simple, utilitarian design is typical for packages found on doorsteps, in mailrooms, or stacked in delivery vehicles.
description: A light brown cardboard parcel sealed with a wide white tape strip, featuring flat surfaces and crisp edges.
description_view_0: The front view shows a broad, flat face of the box with the white tape running horizontally across the top edge.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the vertical strip of white tape running from the top to the bottom, bisecting the face.
description_view_2: The rear view mirrors the front, showing a flat cardboard surface with the tape strip along the top.
description_view_3: This side view is identical to view 1, with the vertical white tape strip centered on the face.
